economic_notes: GBEs include Odawa Stone LP (stone quarry) and Odawa Freshwater LP. Business partnerships include UCCM Building Material Supply LP (lumber/building materials, 14.28%), M'Nidoo M'Nising Power LP (electrical power generation, 16.665%), and Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP (accommodation/restaurant/catering, 11.75%). COVID-19 noted as ongoing financial risk.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Odawa Stone LP, Odawa Stone GP, Odawa Freshwater LP, Odawa Freshwater GP. Three business partnerships also on modified equity: UCCMLP, MMPLP, GLHGLP. ISC deferred revenue opening/closing used to calculate recognized ISC revenue of $3,849,943. Total government transfers = Federal ($3,971,377) + Provincial ($1,123,381) + Kinoomaadziwin Education Body ($1,591,359) = $6,686,117 if KEB treated as government transfer; alternatively $5,094,758 excluding KEB. KEB is a separate education body so included in total_government_transfers here at $5,094,758 (Federal + Provincial only). Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text. Segmented expenses show Employment and Economic Development at $2,613,759 (mapped to expenses_enterprises). Net debt of $835,424 reported on statement of changes in net debt.
